name: Felicity Farseer
unlock: Gain exploration rank Scout or higher, then gift 1 unit of Meta Alloys.

name: Elvira Martuuk
unlock: Travel 300 Ly or more from your career start system, then gift 3 units of Soontill Relics.

name: The Dweller
unlock: Deal with at least 5 black-market contacts, then pay 500,000 Cr.

name: Tod "The Blaster" McQuinn
unlock: Earn 15+ Combat Bonds, then gift 25 units of Modular Terminals.

name: Liz Ryder
unlock: Reach Cordial status with Eurybia Blue Mafia, then gift 200 units of Landmines.

name: Selene Jean
unlock: Mine at least 500 tons of ore, then gift 10 units of Painite.

name: Professor Palin
unlock: Travel 5,000 Ly from career start and meet Marco Qwent, then gift 25 units of Sensor Fragments.

name: Marco Qwent
unlock: Obtain a Sirius Corp permit (invite) and gift 25 units of Modular Terminals.

name: Hera Tani
unlock: Reach at least Outsider rank with the Empire and meet Liz Ryder, then gift 50 units of Kamitra Cigars.

name: Etienne Dorn
unlock: Reach at least Master rank with the Empire and meet Liz Ryder, then gift 25 units of Occupied Escape Pods.

name: Colonel Bris Dekker
unlock: Obtain a Sol permit (Federation Midshipman) and meet Juri Ishmaak, then gift 1,000,000 Cr.

name: Lei Cheung
unlock: Trade with 50+ different markets and meet The Dweller, then gift 200 units of Gold.
